projects.title: CricketMania
projects.shortDesc: Full-stack cricket venue booking platform — web, NestJS API, and React Native app with OTP auth and real-time slot locking.
projects.description:
CricketMania connects cricket players with bookable venues and gives venue owners a complete digital operations hub. Players browse venues by city, compare pitch availability and hourly rates, and book time slots. Owners onboard venues with multiple pitches, set day-specific operating hours, manage image galleries, and handle bookings through a secure role-based system.

The platform spans three deliverables: a Next.js 16 web frontend (App Router, React 19, Tailwind CSS v4), a production NestJS backend with PostgreSQL/Prisma (booking engine, S3 media, Twilio OTP, JWT RBAC), and a React Native Expo mobile app with glassmorphic UI for both Player and Owner roles.

The backend implements concurrent slot locking, booking lifecycle states (PENDING → CONFIRMED → COMPLETED), pricing snapshots, guest bookings, and owner-scoped venue management. The mobile app delivers venue discovery feeds, owner dashboards, gallery upload/reorder, and secure token storage via Expo Secure Store.
highlights: Concurrent booking engine with slot locking to prevent double-booking
Multi-pitch venues with per-day operating hours
Dual-role RBAC: Player vs Venue Owner with ownership verification
Twilio OTP authentication and JWT sessions
S3-backed media gallery with upload, reorder, and batch delete
React Native app with cinematic animations and owner management flows

deliverables.name: Web Frontend
deliverables.stack: Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript

deliverables.name: API Backend
deliverables.stack: NestJS, PostgreSQL, Prisma, AWS S3, Twilio

deliverables.name: Mobile App
deliverables.stack: React Native, Expo Router, NativeWind, Reanimated

roadmap: Fantasy league auth and state management

projects.title: Map Builder
projects.shortDesc: Enterprise geospatial platform — Mapbox frontend, Django/PostGIS backend, GeoServer automation, and AI-assisted spatial tools.
projects.description:
Map Builder is a full-stack geospatial application for interactive mapping, dataset management, and spatial analysis. Users upload vector and raster data, visualize layers on high-performance Mapbox GL maps, draw and annotate geometries, and save project workspaces.

The Django backend processes shapefiles and GeoTIFFs via GDAL/Rasterio, stores geometries in PostGIS, and automatically provisions GeoServer workspaces and WMS/WFS layers. An OpenAI-powered assistant interprets natural-language spatial queries. Stripe handles subscriptions and usage-based billing behind JWT-protected APIs.
highlights: End-to-end geospatial ETL pipeline (GDAL, Rasterio → PostGIS)
Automated GeoServer layer publishing via REST API
Mapbox GL JS + Draw + Fabric.js for mapping and annotations
Stripe subscription and secure JWT access
Project workspaces with persisted layers, zoom, and drawings

projects.title: Travelista
projects.shortDesc: B2B travel agency platform — React dashboard, Django multi-tenant API, and mobile app for packages, groups, bookings, and payments.
projects.description:
Travelista streamlines travel agency operations: company onboarding, itinerary packaging, group tour administration, customer CRM, booking workflows, and payment reconciliation. The React 19 dashboard uses Redux Toolkit and RTK Query with cookie-based JWT auth, silent token refresh, and a mandatory company setup wizard before dashboard access.

The Django 5 backend implements multi-tenant company profiles, a hierarchical package engine (countries → cities → accommodations with dynamic pricing JSON), group capacity tracking, customer profiling with agency links, booking status workflows, and offline/gateway payment verification with S3 proof uploads. OpenAPI docs are generated via drf-spectacular.
highlights: Multi-tenant B2B company onboarding and verification workflow
Hierarchical package builder with destinations, accommodations, and galleries
Group tour capacity management and member assignment
Booking engine with walk-in vs company-customer source tracking
Payment ledger: offline proofs, Stripe gateway hooks, status verification
Protected routes, silent JWT refresh, Redux Persist state

deliverables.name: Agency Dashboard
deliverables.stack: React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS 4, RTK Query

projects.title: Spatial Estate
projects.shortDesc: Real estate marketing application with map-based property discovery.
projects.description: Built a real estate marketing platform with an interactive map interface for property discovery, radius-based filtering, neighborhood insights, and agent lead management. Combines spatial data with modern property listing workflows.

projects.title: TailorMe
projects.shortDesc: Custom tailoring management system with online ordering and appointment booking.
projects.description: Developed an end-to-end tailoring management system covering customer measurement profiles, online order placement, appointment scheduling, and order status tracking. Designed for small-to-medium tailoring businesses moving operations online.

projects.title: Location Tech Portfolio
projects.shortDesc: Company portfolio website built with Nuxt 3, Tailwind CSS v4, and GSAP.
projects.description: Designed and built the company's own portfolio website using Nuxt 3, Tailwind CSS v4, @nuxt/content, and GSAP animations. Features scroll-reveal effects, animated stats, filterable portfolio grid, project detail pages, and a fully responsive layout from mobile to desktop.
